summary: Comprehensive testing of Timeline Visualizer v5 enhancements completed. Most core features working correctly including edit/delete for all events, period boundary markers, and drilled-in sub-timeline views. Two minor navigation issues identified.

navigation_bugs.issue: Clicking root breadcrumb doesn't navigate back to root timeline - remains in drilled-in view
Add event form doesn't appear when clicking on timeline axis - no modal/form opens

minor_issues.issue: Minor script error in download event handler (cosmetic - doesn't affect functionality)

passed_tests: Timeline loads successfully with proper title and axis
Event markers (11 found) are clickable and responsive
Event card opens as centered modal for all events
Edit button (pencil icon) available on ALL event cards including JSON-loaded events
Edit mode shows inline form fields (title, year, image, description, tags)
Save button in edit mode persists changes correctly
Cancel button in edit mode reverts to view mode without saving
Delete button (trash icon) available on ALL events with confirmation dialog
Period bars (2 found) are clickable and allow drilling into sub-timelines
Period boundary markers visible with dashed lines (2 found) and shaded region
Context events appear dimmed (reduced opacity) in drilled-in view
Export JSON button always visible and clickable
No JavaScript errors or console error messages detected
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix breadcrumb navigation functionality - clicking root breadcrumb should return to root timeline. Investigate add event form on timeline axis click - form should open when clicking axis.

success_percentage.frontend: 85% - Most v5 enhancements working correctly with 2 minor navigation issues
